title: The Elven Embassy
description: The Keepers have received troubling news: an Elven ambassador from Silvanost was last seen traveling toward Dalhurst, carrying a treaty that could reshape relations between the races. She never arrived. Aldric Vane believes dark forces may have intercepted her. Find the ambassador - and the treaty - before the delicate peace between humans and elves collapses.

objectives.description: Investigate the ambassador's last known location on the eastern road
Find evidence of what happened to the ambassador
Track the captors to their hideout
Defeat the cultists holding the ambassador
Escort the ambassador safely to the Elven outpost
